channel.title: Notes on programmerraja blog
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on programmerraja blog

item.title: Python
item.description:
Data types

- Numeric Types
  - int
  - float
  - complex
- Sequence Types
  - str #""
  - list #[]
  - tuple #()
- Mapping Type
  - dict #{}
- Set Types
  - set #{}
  - frozenset
- Boolean Type
  - bool #True/False
- Binary Types
  - bytes #[]
  - bytearray
  - memoryview

Mutable and Imutable

Mutable data types are those whose contents can be changed after creation, while immutable data types cannot be changed once they are created.
